verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (GRP78/BiP) is predominantly an ER-luminal chaperone retained by KDEL. However, under stress conditions (ER stress, hypoxia, oncogenic transformation, apoptosis), a well-documented pool translocates to the cell surface where it is accessible to antibodies and other extracellular binders. Surface GRP78 has been exploited therapeutically (e.g., anti-GRP78 antibodies in cancer). The surface form acts as a co-receptor/signaling hub accessible from the extracellular face, qualifying as contextual (cell_state_induced).
